scope: Battle Command minimap navigation and frontline jump controls

checks.name: npm run build
checks.notes: TypeScript project build and Vite production build completed successfully.

checks.name: desktop browser QA
checks.notes: In-app browser reached Battle Command at http://127.0.0.1:5173/ after starting the local Vite server.

qaFlow: Theater Command -> Army Camp -> Deployment -> Battle Command.
Verified `.battle-minimap-panel`, `.battle-minimap`, `.battle-map-scroll`, and five `.battle-minimap-jumps button` controls exist.
Clicked/focused the minimap and pressed ArrowRight. The tactical map scrollLeft changed to 268, focus marker appeared, and readout became `視界 16-100% / X105 Y50`.
Pressed the third frontline jump button. The active jump became `右翼`, readout became `視界 0-84% / X35 Y71`, and the selected-frontline text included `右翼泥濘線`.
implementedBehavior: Battle Command minimap now sits in a navigation panel with a visible readout.
The minimap click target records both X and Y battle coordinates for the focus marker/readout.
ArrowLeft/ArrowRight/Home/End on the focused minimap pan the wide battle map horizontally.
Five frontline jump buttons select a frontline segment and scroll to its anchor.
The last minimap/navigation target is shown as a focus marker and coordinate label.
outOfScope: No save or BattleState schema fields were added.
Mobile/cellphone QA remains outside the current active target.
The battle map still scrolls horizontally; vertical minimap clicks are represented as focus/readout coordinates rather than vertical map scroll.
